title: UniBond 2078485 Speed Seal Sealant, 1x291g Cartridge , White
features: 35 year guarantee (provided good working practices are followed)
Specially formulated – The anti mould sealant is ideal for warm, humid environments such as bathrooms and kitchens and is also suitable as a (power) shower sealant and sink sealant.
Package Contents– UniBond Speed Seal Sealant, sanitary sealant for humid environments such as bathrooms and kitchens, allows showers within 1h, long-lasting and mould resistant, 1x291g Cartridge
Suitable for power showers, bathrooms, kitchens, baths, toilets, worktops, tiled areas, sinks and basins and bedding compound
Hygienic barrier – The UniBond sealant provides long-lasting, hygienic, waterproof and mould resistant seals for sanitary applications by creating a flexible barrier.
Easy-to-use – Complete jobs quickly: after applying with the gun, the kitchen silicone can be exposed to indirect water contact after 1h and is fully dry after 24 hours.
description: From the manufacturer About UniBond In the UK, UniBond offers a wide range of DIY products - Construction Adhesives, Sealants and Tile Adhesives. By offering guidance and smart total bonding solutions, it simplifies every kind of DIY job for both inside and outside the house. UniBond Speed Seal Sealant - Fast curing, hygienic seals for warm & humid environments Seal joints and angles fast and effectively with UniBond Speed Seal Sealant Ideal for warm and humid environments, the silicone sealant is Unibond's fastest sealant yet and suitable for showers, bathrooms, kitchens, baths, tiled areas. It even works as a worktop and toilet sealant. It provides hygienic, waterproof and mould resistant seals for sanitary applications by creating a flexible waterproof barrier. After application, it can handle indirect water contact after just 1 hour and is fully dry after 24 hours, meaning your bathroom can be back in use in no time. Fast curing Anti-mould formulation Ideal for wet environments like bath and kitchen Provides a hygienic and water-resistant barrier Colour: White Format: 1x291g Cartridge Seal wet areas in kitchens and bathrooms fast! Fast-curing and with a flexible bond UniBond Speed Seal Sealant is perfect for sealing wet areas in and around your house, such as your kitchen and bathroom. Once applied, your shower will be useable in just one hour thanks to the fast-curing formula. Easy and precise application The cartridge design ensures a simple and precise application, allowing control of the flow of sealant with the use of a cartridge gun. The nozzle allows you to work on all surfaces, whether large or small. Anti-mould formulation The sealant's special formulation means it prevents mould from forming, creating a long-lasting, hygienic and waterproof barrier for sanitary environments and settings. Simple steps to fast sealing Completely remove the old sealant and any residues. Thoroughly clean the joint to remove contaminants and allow to dry. Cut off the tip of the cartridge above the screw thread. Remove the nozzle cap and trim the nozzle to fit the joint width. Mount the nozzle onto the cartridge. Insert the cartridge into cartridge gun. Pull trigger to apply sealant into the joint. Ensure sealant has good contact with both sides of the joint. Smooth sealant with a sealant finishing tool within 5 minutes. Remove excess immediately using white spirit.
